title: PPIP - Share Data toggle can be changed to ON or OFF while on Guest account
scenario: Share Data toggle in App Settings > General > Account is modifiable when using a Guest account, contrary to expected behavior
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. If not already on the Home screen, navigate to the Home screen.
3. Tap the Account icon or navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
5. Observe the current state of the toggle (ON or OFF).
6. Tap the 'Share Data' toggle to change its state (e.g., from OFF to ON or ON to OFF).
7. Verify that the toggle changes state and the change is persisted.
8. Navigate away from the Account screen and return to confirm the toggle retains the new state.
expected: The 'Share Data' toggle in App Settings > General > Account should be user-modifiable (can be toggled ON or OFF) even when using a Guest account. The toggle should reflect the user's choice made during onboarding (via the PPIP dialog with 'Don't Share' and 'Share Data' options) and should persist the change.
